name: gcp boundary: an apply on a valid validated handoff authorizes the external call
command:
cat > h.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"gcp","route":"gcp-boundary","selected_option":{"option_id":"opt-balanced","summary":"Balanced","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az"]},"iac_targets":["terraform"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az"]}
JEOF
cat > native.json <<'JEOF'
{"review_ref":"native-review/gcp-proj-1","recommendations":[{"name":"rec-1","primaryImpact":{"category":"SECURITY"},"description":"Enable CMEK encryption on buckets","priority":"P1"},{"name":"rec-2","primaryImpact":{"category":"COST"},"description":"Remove idle persistent disks","priority":"P2"}]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/gcp-boundary.sh" --handoff h.json --native-response native.json --apply --out r.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z
